name: FastBenchmark.Backend

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: The message type for the backend.

aliases.name: Ports
aliases.type: { fromFrontend : (Codec.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, toFrontend : Codec.Value -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg }

aliases.name: Program
aliases.comment: A convenient type for a backend `Program`.

values.name: app
values.type: FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function -> FastBenchmark.Backend.Ports (FastBenchmark.Backend.Msg graph function) -> FastBenchmark.Backend.Program graph function

name: FastBenchmark.Config

unions.name: Config
unions.comment: All the information needed to run a benchmark.

values.name: functionToString
values.comment: Converts a function to a user-visible string.

values.name: init
values.comment: Initializes the benchmark configuration with some mandatory options.
values.type: { graphTitle : graph -> String.String, functionToString : function -> String.String, graphCodec : Codec.Codec graph, functionCodec : Codec.Codec function, graphs : List.List graph, graphData : graph -> { functions : List.List function, sizes : List.List Basics.Int }, runFunction : FastBenchmark.Types.Param graph function -> () -> () } -> FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function

values.name: params
values.comment: Gets the list of all possible params to benchmark.
values.type: FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function -> List.List (FastBenchmark.Types.Param graph function)

values.name: retry
values.type: FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function -> Maybe.Maybe { times : Basics.Int, percentage : Basics.Float }

values.name: runFunction
values.comment: Prepares a function for running inside a benchmark
values.type: FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function -> FastBenchmark.Types.Param graph function -> Benchmark.LowLevel.Operation

values.name: timeout
values.comment: Gets the timeout (in ms) for each `Param`.

values.name: withRetry
values.comment:
Try running the benchmark more times (up to `times`) if `max - min` would be more than `percentage * median`.

Reasonable values are `5` for `times` and `0.5` for `percentage`.
values.type: { times : Basics.Int, percentage : Basics.Float } -> FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function -> FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function

values.name: withTimeout
values.comment: Sets a timeout (in ms) for each `Param`.
values.type: Basics.Float -> FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function -> FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function

name: FastBenchmark.Frontend

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: The message type for the frontend.

aliases.name: Ports
aliases.type: { terminateAll : {} -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg, fromBackend : ({ index : Basics.Int, data : Codec.Value } -> msg) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, toBackend : { index : Basics.Int, data : Codec.Value } -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg }

aliases.name: Program
aliases.comment: A convenient type for a frontend `Program`.
aliases.type: Platform.Program FastBenchmark.Frontend.Flags (FastBenchmark.Frontend.Model graph function) (FastBenchmark.Frontend.Msg graph function)

values.name: app
values.type: FastBenchmark.Config.Config graph function -> FastBenchmark.Frontend.Ports (FastBenchmark.Frontend.Msg graph function) -> FastBenchmark.Frontend.Program graph function

name: FastBenchmark.Types

unions.name: ToBackend
unions.comment: Message that gets sent to the backend.

unions.name: ToFrontend
unions.comment: Message that gets sent to the frontend.
cases: { timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, params : List.List (FastBenchmark.Types.Param graph function) }

aliases.name: Param
aliases.comment: Parameters needed to measure the timing.
aliases.type: { graph : graph, function : function, size : Basics.Int }

aliases.name: Stats
aliases.type: { firstQuartile : Basics.Float, median : Basics.Float, thirdQuartile : Basics.Float, max : Basics.Float, min : Basics.Float, outliers : List.List Basics.Float }
